title: The Tooth Truth
premise_summary: Boomy claims he brushed his teeth. His dry toothbrush and minty 'aura' tell a different story.
cover_description: A cartoon bear holding a dry toothbrush with a guilty grin and sparkle effects around his unbrushed teeth.
script:
[TITLE: The Tooth Truth]
[CHARACTERS: Boomy, Melody]

[HOST_INTRO]
MELODY: So, Boomy told me he brushed his teeth tonight. I have... questions. Let’s listen.

[/HOST_INTRO]

[THE_CONVERSATION]
BOOMY: I definitely brushed my teeth.
MELODY: Really?
BOOMY: Yep. Sparkling.
[SFX: soft_pop]

MELODY: Your toothbrush is dry.
BOOMY: I used the *other* toothbrush.
MELODY: You only have one.
BOOMY: The invisible one.
[SFX: tiny_squeak]

MELODY: Boomy.
BOOMY: Fine. I *planned* to brush them.
MELODY: That’s not how teeth work.
BOOMY: It’s a *preventative* brush.
[SFX: slide_whistle_up]

MELODY: You can’t prevent brushing by not brushing.
BOOMY: I can if I *believe* hard enough.
[PAUSE: 600]
[SFX: gentle_rumble]

MELODY: Your breath smells like mint.
BOOMY: That’s just my *aura*.
[SFX: soft_splat]

MELODY: Boomy.
BOOMY: Okay, okay! I *swished* with mouthwash.
MELODY: For three seconds?
BOOMY: It was a *focused* swish.
[SFX: warm_tada]

MELODY: You’re impossible.
BOOMY: That was SUPPOSED to happen.
[PAUSE: 800]
[SFX: pillow_thud]
[BREAK]

[/THE_CONVERSATION]

[THE_END]
MELODY: And that’s why you should *always* check for invisible toothbrushes. Goodnight.

[/THE_END]
host_intro: So, Boomy told me he brushed his teeth tonight. I have... questions. Let’s listen.
host_outro: And that’s why you should *always* check for invisible toothbrushes. Goodnight.
